text:
“Why do you have a birthday cake for your dog?”

Because he’s family. ❤️

He’s there for the good days, the bad days, and every ordinary day in between. He makes me laugh, keeps me company, and fills my life with more love than I ever thought possible.

So yes, he gets a birthday cake. Because every year with him is worth celebrating. 🎂🐾

Happy early Birthday, Mason. (June 27th) My forever baby, my best friend, and the little Ewok who stole my heart.❤️ 

#shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzugram #shihtzu #shihtzunation
